subject: How was your last cup of coffee, {{FIRST_NAME}}?
html:
The first sip is just the beginning

Hi {{FIRST_NAME}},

We noticed you joined Indian Coffee Beans recently, but have not rated a coffee yet. Whether it was a bright fruity pour-over or a bold South Indian Filter coffee, your feedback helps others discover their next favorite bag.

You do not need a long review. A quick rating is enough to build your profile and help the community.

Find and Rate Your Coffee

Happy brewing,
The Indian Coffee Beans Team

subject: How’s the coffee tasting, {{FIRST_NAME}}?
html:
Your coffee journey is just getting started

Hi {{FIRST_NAME}},

It has been a couple of days since you joined Indian Coffee Beans. Rating just a few coffees helps you remember what you loved and what you did not.

Rate 3 coffees to start seeing your taste profile emerge. It takes seconds.

Rate Your First Coffee

Happy brewing,
The Indian Coffee Beans Team

subject: Only 3 ratings away from your coffee profile, {{FIRST_NAME}}!
html:
How's the coffee tasting, {{FIRST_NAME}}?

It has been a few days since you joined, and we would love to see what you have been brewing.

Once you rate your first 3 coffees, your profile starts to come alive and your preferences become clearer.

Rate Your First Coffee

See you at the brew bar,
The Indian Coffee Beans Team

subject: Still thinking about that last cup?
html:
Keep track of every sip

Hi {{FIRST_NAME}},

It has been a week since you joined Indian Coffee Beans. If you have been busy, this is a gentle reminder to log your recent brews.

Rating helps you build a personal record and helps others discover great Indian roasters.

Rate Your First Coffee

See you over at the directory,
The Indian Coffee Beans Team
